hero.title: Stop doing
hero.description: You ask AI for code with no process, no traceability, no review. The result? Fragile code, invisible tech debt, and zero leverage from the real potential of these tools.
hero.value: This is a complete AI-assisted development workflow — from feature conception to code review — with technical grounding on
workflow.title: The Workflow
workflow.subtitle: 7 skills that turn AI usage into a disciplined, reproducible process.
contextRot.heading: The Science Behind It
contextRot.subheading: Why on-demand skills are more efficient than global rules in LLM context windows.
contextRot.whatIsP1Before: LLMs like Claude, GPT, and Gemini have increasingly larger context windows — 128k, 200k, up to 1M tokens. But
contextRot.whatIsP1Strong: a larger window doesn't mean better performance
contextRot.whatIsP1After: . Studies show that response quality degrades significantly when input exceeds the 80k–120k token range.
contextRot.whatIsP2After: : the more irrelevant or redundant information is pushed into the context window, the worse the model performs on tasks requiring precision — like generating code, following complex instructions, or maintaining coherence in long conversations.
contextRot.globalRule1: All instructions loaded in every interaction, even when irrelevant
contextRot.globalRule2: Consumes context tokens before your first message
contextRot.globalRule3: Conflicting instructions pile up and confuse the model
contextRot.globalRule4: Performance degrades as the rules file grows
contextRot.onDemand1: Only the relevant skill is loaded when you need it
contextRot.onDemand2: Clean, focused context — the model knows exactly what to do
contextRot.onDemand3: No conflicting instructions — each skill is self-contained
contextRot.onDemand4: Scales without degradation — add new skills without polluting the context
contextRot.practicalTitle: Why does this matter in practice?
contextRot.practicalP1After: file with hundreds of rules looks organized — but in reality it's consuming the most valuable tokens in the context window: the first ones. When you ask the model to implement a feature, the context is already partially "rotten" with instructions that don't apply to that task.
contextRot.practicalP2Before: Chroma's research (2025) showed that models lose up to
contextRot.practicalP2After: when the context is filled with irrelevant information, even within the technical window limit.
contextRot.practicalP3After: reinforces: discipline in what enters the context window has a direct correlation with output quality. Less junk, better results.
contextRot.analogyGlobalBefore: It's like walking into a meeting carrying
contextRot.analogyGlobalAfter: in the company. The relevant information exists, but it's buried in noise. You spend more time searching than deciding.
contextRot.analogyOnDemandBefore: It's like walking into the meeting with
contextRot.analogyOnDemandAfter: for that agenda. Total focus, quick decisions, zero distraction. Exactly what the model needs to perform.
sticky.whatIsP2After: : the more irrelevant or redundant information is pushed into the context window, the worse the model performs on tasks requiring precision.
sticky.globalRule4: Performance degrades as the file grows
sticky.onDemand4: Add skills without polluting the context
sticky.practicalP1After: consumes the most valuable tokens — the first ones. The context is already partially "rotten" with instructions that don't apply to the task.
sticky.practicalP2Before: Chroma's research (2025) showed a loss of up to
sticky.practicalP2After: with irrelevant context, even within the technical limit. Less junk, better results.
sticky.analogyGlobalAfter: . The relevant information exists, but buried in noise.

download.label: Download skills
dialog.installDescription: Unzip the file and copy the skills/ folder to the correct directory.
dialog.wslHint: Inside WSL, the home directory is at /home/<user>/.claude/skills/. On native Windows, the path is different.
dialog.pathNote: Paths may vary depending on the tool you use. The LLM itself can help you find the correct directory for your setup.
meta.title: Professional AI coding workflow
meta.description: Stop vibe coding. Adopt a professional AI-assisted development workflow — from feature conception to code review.
